support_ticket_desc: I cannot believe the level of service I have received. I have been a loyal ShopNest customer since 2020 and have spent thousands of dollars on this platform. I have recommended ShopNest to everyone I know - my coworkers, my neighbors, my entire book club. I have never once filed a complaint or asked for anything special. I always leave five star reviews and I tip delivery drivers generously. And THIS is how you treat your most loyal customers? I am beyond frustrated. I spent over three hours today trying to reach your support team and not a single person gave me a straight answer. Your chatbot is completely useless, your email support is nonexistent, and your phone line had a 40 minute hold time. I have screenshots of every single interaction. I will be filing a complaint with the Better Business Bureau if this is not resolved by end of day. Anyway. Order SNX-4421 for a Bosch dishwasher. Delivered wrong model. Want replacement.

Ord SNX-8902 ACH debit failed at checkout, tried 2x. CC also declined. PayPal unavail for this item. Need NDD before the 15th. Card limit confirmed ok but txn still failing. Pls check PG logs and escalate. Alt PMT: can store credit from prev RMA be applied to this order? ASAP.
not working. please help.

Okay so I have genuinely had it with this company. Every single time I place an order something goes wrong. Last month it was a delayed delivery. The month before that it was a damaged product. Before that it was a wrong item sent. I have contacted support so many times I have lost count. Every single time I am told the issue will be resolved within 24 to 48 hours and it never is. I sit and wait and absolutely nothing happens. Then I have to follow up again and I get another sorry for the inconvenience. Sorry does not fix anything. I work full time and I do not have the bandwidth to keep chasing a company for basic service delivery. My colleagues have been telling me to switch platforms and honestly I am starting to think they are right. Order #SNX-9021, KitchenAid stand mixer, payment charged twice for the same order. Need one charge reversed immediately.
refund not received

Hi. I placed an order for a laptop. It is a Dell. I ordered it last Monday I think or maybe Tuesday. The order number is in my email somewhere - I believe it is SNX-3310 or maybe SNX-3130, I am not completely sure. Delivery came two days later which I thought was great. But when I opened the box the laptop would not turn on at all. I tried charging it for over an hour. Nothing. I tried a different charger I had at home. Still nothing. My roommate who works in IT also took a look and said it sounds like a hardware defect straight out of the box. The outer box also had a small dent on one corner but I am not sure if that is relevant. I want to return it and get a replacement. Or maybe a refund. I am honestly not sure which option makes more sense for me. Can someone advise? Also is there a home pickup option because I do not have easy access to a drop off location.

ORDER SNX-6612 DELIVERED WRONG ITEM. I ORDERED NIKE RUNNING SHOES SIZE 11 AND THEY SENT SOME RANDOM SANDAL I HAVE NEVER EVEN HEARD OF. THIS IS THE THIRD WRONG ITEM THIS MONTH. I WANT MY SHOES OR A FULL REFUND. ALSO WHY IS THERE NO DIRECT PHONE NUMBER - YOUR CHATBOT IS COMPLETELY USELESS AND I AM DONE WITH IT.

Hello, good morning. I hope this message finds you well. I am reaching out today regarding a small matter pertaining to a recent order of mine. I do not wish to be a burden and I fully understand how busy your team must be. I simply wanted to follow up when you have a free moment as I have been waiting for a little while now. I appreciate everything your team does and I am grateful for your time. Warm regards.

I want to be very clear about how disappointed I am with this entire experience. Two full weeks. Two weeks and I have received nothing but conflicting information and broken promises. I have called four separate times. Each agent told me something completely different. First it was a warehouse backlog. Then it was a carrier issue. Then I was told my address was incomplete - which is absolutely false because I have received over a dozen previous orders at this exact address without any issue whatsoever. I even emailed a screenshot of my confirmed address and was still told it was incorrect. The level of disorganization here is genuinely shocking. I have already contacted my state's consumer protection office and I am keeping a full record of every interaction. Order SNX-2201, Bose noise cancelling headphones, still not delivered after 14 days. Tracking has been frozen since day three.

Payment gateway returning a 502 error at checkout. Tried incognito mode, cleared cache, tested on two different browsers, issue persists. My Visa debit card is showing a pre-authorization hold of $89.99 but the order was never confirmed and no order ID was generated. Transaction reference from my bank statement is TXN8821047. Is this a gateway timeout on your end or a merchant-side failure? I need either an order confirmation or the pre-auth hold released within 24 hours otherwise I will dispute the charge with my bank.

So I was just browsing the app and added a few things to my cart and then I figured why not just go ahead and order and so I did and I got a confirmation email right away which was great and I was pretty excited and then the next day I checked the app and it said processing and then the day after that it still said processing and now it has been almost five days and it is still just sitting there saying processing and my friend said maybe the item went out of stock but then why did you even let me complete the order and charge my card and also that money is just tied up now and what if I need it for something else and I have ordered from here before with no issues so I really do not know what is different this time

To Whom It May Concern, I am writing this formal communication to bring to your attention a matter of considerable concern regarding a transaction completed on your platform on the 14th of this month. I have been a registered ShopNest customer for several years and have completed numerous transactions without incident. I consider myself a diligent and detail-oriented consumer and have retained all relevant documentation including the original order confirmation, payment receipt, delivery confirmation, and photographic evidence which I am prepared to submit upon request. I have deliberately refrained from posting publicly about this matter as I prefer to resolve disputes through proper channels, though I reserve the right to escalate if necessary. The core issue is this: Order reference SNX-5502 for one LG 22 cubic foot French door refrigerator was delivered on the confirmed date, however upon inspection the unit delivered is a 19 cubic foot model and not the 22 cubic foot model I ordered and paid for. The price difference is approximately $340. I am requesting either an immediate replacement with the correct model or a refund of the price differential.

I already submitted a complaint about this last week. I have a ticket number somewhere but I cannot find it right now. Nobody followed up with me. I am submitting again. Same issue as before. Please look up my account and check the previous case. My order involves the headphones I ordered last month.

Your DoorDash driver was over an hour late and my food arrived completely cold. The driver never called or knocked. I want a full refund for the entire order. I ordered a burger combo and two drinks. Extremely disappointed with this service.

First I just want to say I genuinely love ShopNest and have been a customer for years. Your app is intuitive, delivery is usually really fast, and the return process has always been seamless. Your support team has been incredibly helpful in the past and I have recommended this platform to pretty much everyone in my neighborhood. That said I do want to flag one issue. Order SNX-1142 for a range hood was placed nine days ago. There has been no delivery and no update whatsoever. Tracking shows it left the warehouse eight days ago and has not moved since. That is all - just hoping someone can look into it.

my order for the blue jacket still hasnt arrived. i think i placed it last tuesday or wednesday. i dont have the order number handy but it was somewhere around $65 or $70 i think. can someone check and let me know what is going on

I work in software so I have a reasonable understanding of how inventory systems work and what happened here is clearly a stock management failure on your end. Your system showed the item as in stock. I placed the order. My card was charged. A confirmation was sent. Then six hours later I received an automated cancellation email citing stock unavailability. If the item was not available your system should not have listed it as in stock - this is basic inventory hygiene. Furthermore the refund has not posted after five business days. Per your own published policy the refund SLA is three to five business days. We are now past that window. Order SNX-0032 cancelled, $249.99 not refunded. Requesting immediate escalation to your billing team.

hi I ordered a blender order number SNX-6644 and it was delivered yesterday but when I opened the box the glass jar was cracked and there was also a visible dent on the base of the unit and I tried to use it anyway but it is making a really loud grinding noise and honestly I am scared to keep using it in case it breaks further or causes an injury so I want to return it and get a replacement sent but the return window says 10 days and I want to make sure I am still within that window because I really do not want to be stuck with a broken appliance that showed up damaged right out of the box
SNX-3301. DOA unit. Need RMA issued. Escalate to L2. Already past SLA window.

You know what I am just going to say it. I have never in my life had to fight this hard just to get something I already paid for. Your app promised two day delivery. It has been eight days. I have screenshots. Your chatbot gave me three completely different delivery dates. Your support email told me to contact the seller. The seller told me to contact ShopNest. You told me to contact the seller. Around and around we go. This is textbook buck-passing and it is completely unacceptable behavior from a company of your size. I have already filed a complaint with the FTC and I have spoken with a consumer rights attorney who confirmed I have grounds to pursue damages for this level of negligence. Do not for a second think I am bluffing. My only ask is simple: Order SNX-8112, Cuisinart coffee maker, either deliver it or refund me $79. That is the whole ask.
